  Quot.lift (fun c => Coalg.toCofix c) h self

rw [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
      rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] at h_bisim
      specialize h_bisim s t hR
      rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map] at h_bisim ⊢
      refine MvFunctor.liftR_mono h_bisim ?_
      intro i x y h
      cases i with
      | fz => exact ⟨x, y, h, rfl, rfl⟩
      | fs => exact h

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_map, MvQPF.liftR_map] at h_bisim ⊢
      refine MvQPF.LiftR_mono ?_ h_bisim
      intro i x y
      cases i
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun_fz]; intro h; exact ⟨s, t, h, rfl, rfl⟩
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun_fs]; exact id
    · use a.s, b.s, h_R, rfl, rfl

rw [Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
      specialize h_bisim s t hR
      rw [MvQPF.union_dest_eq_left, MvQPF.union_dest_eq_right] at h_bisim
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_bisim ⊢
      rw [MvQPF.repr_map, MvQPF.repr_map] at h_bisim ⊢
      rcases h_bisim with ⟨h_shape, h_rel⟩
      refine ⟨h_shape, ?_⟩
      intro i k
      specialize h_rel i k
      cases i
      · exact h_rel
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.splitFun] at h_rel ⊢
        exact ⟨s, t, h_rel, rfl, rfl⟩
    · exact ⟨a.s, b.s, h_R, rfl, rfl⟩
  Quot.lift toCofix h self

rw [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec, Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have H := h_bisim s t hR
      rw [union_dest_eq_left, union_dest_eq_right] at H
      rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map] at H
      rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map]
      refine MvQPF.LiftR_imp _ _ ?_ H
      intro i x y h
      cases i using Fin.lastCases
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast] at h ⊢
        exact h
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.id, TypeVec.appendFun, Split.split, Sum.elim] at h ⊢
        refine ⟨x, y, h, rfl, rfl⟩
  Quot.lift (fun c => Coalg.toCofix c) h self

rw [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
      rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map_iff, MvFunctor.liftR_map_iff]
      refine MvQPF.LiftR_mono ?_ (h_bisim s t hR)
      intro i x y hxy
      cases i <;> simp [RelLast] at hxy ⊢
      · exact hxy
      · use x, y
    · use .inl a.s, .inr b.s; exact ⟨h_R, rfl, rfl⟩
  ) self

simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]
      have := h_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR
      rw [← Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, ← Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] at this
      rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map_iff] at this ⊢
      refine MvFunctor.liftR_mono ?_ this
      intro i x y hxy
      cases i <;> simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id] at hxy ⊢
      · use x, y
        exact ⟨hxy, rfl, rfl⟩
      · exact hxy
